heading: Omitted
label: 1300e Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to division of judgment funds between tribal groups and payment of attorney fees and expenses, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–557, § 186 Stat. 1171Oct. 25, 1972
